title: Rebuild of Evangelion video game an inquiry
display_title: Rebuild of Evangelion video game an inquiry
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild of Evangelion video game? (an inquiry)             Quote Post by EvangelionOtaku » Sun Jun 13, 2010 9:53 pm Has there been any discussions or anouncements from either Gainax, Khara or Anno regarding a next generation, fully-fledged, proper Evangelion game for PS3/Xbox360/PC? I'm shocked this hasn't happened already considering the popularity of the series in Japan (comparable to Star Wars) and how dozens and dozens of Star Wars games are routinely developed and released. I'm talking about a full next-gen Evangelion game, not something like Evangelion: Jo or the titles on mobile phone. Yes, there was the digital Misato newscaster for PS3, but thats not a game, more like a feature not interactive media.

[]: Re: Rebuild of Evangelion video game? (an inquiry)             Quote Post by KaaVI » Mon Jun 14, 2010 12:40 am EvangelionOtaku wrote: considering the popularity of the series in Japan (comparable to Star Wars) and how dozens and dozens of Star Wars games are routinely developed and released.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionOtaku » Mon Jun 14, 2010 12:49 am Why don't you try reading what I wrote? I wasn't comparing Evangelion to Star Wars. I was comparing the level of popularity East (Evangelion) vs. West (Star Wars). Comparable popularity levels. I was asking why there is no new PS3 or Xbox 360 or PC Evangelion game (even in Japan) and if anything at all had been mentioned by way of interviews, sources I haven't seen, Newtype, just anything. I've been waiting for one since the Rebuild series was anounced. Yes, I agree the Star Wars games are crap (including Unleashed, but the Old Republic MMO looks interesting) (and if Star Wars can get triple A next gen titles with full budgets and well known developers, why can't Evangelion?)

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Mon Jun 14, 2010 3:45 am It's very possible that a Rebuild-based version of Evangelions and Evangelions: Another Cases will be released. I doubt that an Evangelion: Ha will come out, but Evangelion: Q, released after the plot is resolved, could work. It will probably have better graphics and more options available than the original versions did. However, the reason Eva doesn't have video games the way SW does is that SW is a fictional universe stretching across 20,000 years. There's a lot to do there. Evangelion just gets pachinko, cell phones, Evangelions/Another Cases/Jo, and the Impression/Girlfriend stuff because you can't really expand the Eva universe in a meaningful way. Before Episode 1, there's no Evangelion-based conflict. After EoE, there are no Evas to fight with.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionOtaku » Mon Jun 14, 2010 7:34 am Well, I was thinking the new, fully fledged game would be a new twist/interpretation of the Evangelion story (ala. Rebuild). And/or that it would be from the perspective of either a different character or a new character, telling it from the perspective of how they dealt with the Third Impact / Post-Cataclysmic world. There are a number of options. It just surprises me that this is not done. And if such a game is developed, a full next-gen title (ala. Evangelion 2), who would develop it I wonder. I'm guessing that the publisher would be Namco Bandai (who has authority of the Evangelion games?) but that doesn't mean they would develop it internally, they could have a third party develop it, assuming they ever develop such a title. Edit: A Rebuild version of Evangelions/Evangelions:Another Cases would be perfect. That would be amazing. I'd love it.

[]:             Quote Post by macrochaos » Fri Jun 18, 2010 7:43 pm It'd be nice if thay AT LEAST make a fighting Eva game ala Smash Bros. and not like the Battle Orchestra, I heard it handles poory

[]:             Quote Post by Sun Stealer » Thu Jul 08, 2010 10:30 am The only way evangelion could be turned into a normal game would be if Room 404 wasn't fanfiction, but it is, so it won't. EvangelionOtaku wrote: Edit: A Rebuild version of Evangelions/Evangelions:Another Cases would be perfect. That would be amazing. I'd love it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 08, 2010 11:18 am Both Evangelion 2 (especially Another Cases--you can play as pretty much everybody in the cast) and Secret of Evangelion (you play as Kaji's killer--he works for Nerv, I think.) are from different perspectives instead of just Shinji. I would absolutely love some kind of Next Generation Eva game, espeically if it would be an updated Eva2-based (more options/better graphics) video game on the New Movie Edition tetralogy. What's disappointing is so many people thought that Eva: Jo was going to be such a game, but instead it copy-pasted a lot of Eva2 images and dialogue (such as the freaking ending. Instead of making a brand new ending for Eva: Jo, it was literally a copy/paste of Eva2 Shinji's Best End in Angel Attack despite throwing in some 3D graphics of Rei floating away from Terminal Dogma. ) while having very little interactivity or good controls during the battles.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Thu Jul 08, 2010 12:54 pm I was rather surprised to fins out that there was a homage to Gunbusters in BO, dissapointed to.

[]:             Quote Post by Tails_night » Wed Jul 14, 2010 10:03 pm Well I hope if they do it'll be somewhere around action rpg or shooter rpg, with some customization. (i.e. wether it has the shoulder pads/fins or not, weapons stored on it, paint, head, and some small things like that). But something innovative as well, like not seen before you know? The most I knew about Eva videogames was something along the lines of one on the ps2 with small missions, and some datign simulators on the psp or something along those lines.

[]:             Quote Post by Thunder Heart Mk.3 » Thu Jul 22, 2010 9:27 am All those starwars games are also crap, they were soo desperate that they had to make a lego game for cash!

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jul 23, 2010 2:29 am I think if a Webuild game were to be made, it would have to be like Eva2 and SIRP, but with a better budget and fancier shit, including graphics, gameplay, and etc.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri Jul 23, 2010 1:30 pm It would be nice if they made a NGE game that would be release in the USA for once. I'm pretty sure we will see a NGE game for the PS3/360/Wii soon.

[]: Evangelion Game             Quote Post by End_Of_Evangelion » Wed Jul 20, 2011 4:57 pm I was watching Ao no Exorcist and after the credits it showed a trailer of Evangelion that looked like a game. It's called 3rd impact, I don't know any of the details because it was in Japanese, but it looks like a game based on Evangelion 2.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 20, 2011 5:02 pm Sound Impact, an upcoming PSP game, which is here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=11559 And to answer this thread's question, some of the Pachinko games are on both PS3 and PSP, but that's it so far.

[]: Re: Rebuild of Evangelion video game? (an inquiry)             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Jul 20, 2011 6:56 pm KaaVI wrote: STARWARS= crap All those starwars games are also crap

[]: Re: Rebuild of Evangelion video game? (an inquiry)             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jul 21, 2011 5:05 am Stryker wrote: Ontopic: Yeah, Sound Impact is coming up. But, for RPG's, I've heard nothing yet. Although, I wouldn't be surprised if they released one after Rebuild is completed.

[]: Re: Rebuild of Evangelion video game? (an inquiry)             Quote Post by Tankred » Thu Jul 21, 2011 7:46 am Stryker wrote: I hate you. Star Wars is fucking awesome.

[]: Re: Rebuild of Evangelion video game? (an inquiry)             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jul 21, 2011 8:44 am EvangelionOtaku wrote: I'm shocked this hasn't happened already considering the popularity of the series in Japan (comparable to Star Wars) and how dozens and dozens of Star Wars games are routinely developed and released.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 21, 2011 11:55 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: I would absolutely love some kind of Next Generation Eva game, espeically if it would be an updated Eva2-based (more options/better graphics) video game on the New Movie Edition tetralogy.
